name: Talisman of Spell Sealing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>封</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>符</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card only if you control "Sealmaster Meisei". Spell Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Spell effects on the field. If you do not control "Sealmaster Meisei", destroy this card.
eff: Activate this card only if you control "Sealmaster Meisei". Spell Cards, and their effects on the field, cannot be activated. Negate all Spell effects on the field. If you do not control "Sealmaster Meisei", destroy this card.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
